purpose: Apply the Phase 2.5 passive/conditional metadata split to feat records and harden static sheet math so only always-on static bonuses enter actor totals.
staticSheetRule: Only staticSheetPolicy include, plus selected_choice_only after a concrete target is resolved, may enter static actor-sheet totals. roll_context_only, contextual_only, exclude, manual_only, and manual_review fail closed during static preparation.

highConfidenceActions.name: Point-Blank Shot
highConfidenceActions.details: Changed broad/duplicate attack bonus into +1 ranged attack and +1 ranged damage gated by ranged + point-blank predicates.

highConfidenceActions.name: Educated
highConfidenceActions.details: Disabled hard-coded Knowledge skill bonuses until the two chosen Knowledge skills are stored on the feat instance.

highConfidenceActions.name: Frightening Presence
highConfidenceActions.details: Disabled Will Defense modifier because the feat improves Frightful Presence outcome rather than actor Will Defense.

highConfidenceActions.name: Point Blank Shot
highConfidenceActions.details: Changed broad/duplicate attack bonus into +1 ranged attack and +1 ranged damage gated by ranged + point-blank predicates.

highConfidenceActions.name: Frightening Presence
highConfidenceActions.details: Disabled Will Defense modifier because the feat improves Frightful Presence outcome rather than actor Will Defense.

engineChanges.change: Canonical passive modifiers now carry mechanicsMode, applicationScope, staticSheetPolicy, runtime-context flags, selected choice, and predicate requirements.
Added context/static-sheet gating so aggregateAll/aggregateTarget/getModifierDetail/buildModifierBreakdown exclude conditional and roll-context modifiers from static totals.
Domain modifier resolution now respects runtime context and domain prefixes such as attack.bonus, damage.ranged, and skill.*.
Attack, damage, skill, and defense domain resolution now passes caller context through to modifier filtering.
Direct PASSIVE/STATE defense scanning now respects Phase 3 staticSheetPolicy and runtime-context flags.
Direct PASSIVE/STATE skill scanning now respects Phase 3 staticSheetPolicy and runtime-context flags.
Added predicate helpers for choice-backed weapon roll matching, Dodge target checks, movement-provoked attacks of opportunity, Frightful Presence action context, and enemy-failed-Will triggers.
Selected-choice static modifiers now require an actual resolved selected choice before entering static totals.

importantExamples.name: Improved Defenses
importantExamples.result: Still contributes +1 to Fortitude, Reflex, and Will static totals.

importantExamples.name: Weapon Focus
importantExamples.result: Available all the time for the chosen weapon, but never a global static attack bonus.

importantExamples.name: Dodge
importantExamples.result: No longer allowed to inflate static Reflex Defense.

importantExamples.name: Mobility
importantExamples.result: No longer allowed to inflate static Reflex Defense.

importantExamples.name: Frightening Presence
importantExamples.result: Wrong Will Defense modifier disabled; needs a Frightful Presence resolution hook later.

importantExamples.name: Educated
importantExamples.result: Hard-coded Knowledge bonuses disabled until the selected Knowledge skills are stored.

deferred: Toughness is marked static/passive for now, but its +HP-per-level scaling should be audited separately.
Many manual_only feats still need explicit automation design before they can move from notes/manual handling into real mechanics.
Existing actors with embedded old feat items may need item refresh/remigration if their embedded item data predates this pack metadata.
